response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems with strong fundamentals in TDD, CI/CD, and distributed services (notably high-throughput work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flighting, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — all central to this Principal/IC6 growth-engineering role. Technical leadership is present but at Staff level rather than Principal scope across multi-team initiatives.
strengths: 13+ years engineering experience across JS/TS, C/C++, Java, D — matches language requirements
Distributed/high-throughput service experience at Dunnhumby (millions of req/sec)
Strong software-craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, mentoring
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis work
Scope of leadership appears Staff-level; no clear Principal-level multi-team architectural ownership

key_factors.factor: Strong distributed-systems and full-stack engineering breadth
